TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ellen_Johnson_Sirleaf, title = Ellen_Johnson_Sirleaf, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ellen_Johnson_Sirleaf} }

S.FORM: Ellen Johnson Sirleaf 10 bulad 29 demiad, Ellen Johnson Sirleaf, u misingkiway. 1938 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Liberia ayza sa ci Ellen Johnson Sirleaf, micakat a demiad sa i 2006 a mihca 1 bulad 18 demiad.
S.PHON: …ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôn *ońßnson sirr~…ĺ…ôaf ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, …ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôn *ońßnson sirr~…ĺ…ôaf, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan) u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu r~…ĺib…ôria ajza sa ¶i …ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôn *ońßnson sirr~…ĺ…ôaf, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad.
